backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the backend with hardcoded lists of games and shows (titles, descriptions, embed URLs, thumbnails) and blob storage mixin included.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented feature IDs (UI redesign, section card grid, music section, etc.) to their affected files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line descriptions of every frontend source file, serving as a human-readable index of the frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (background, foreground, card, primary, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with the page title 'zakariasadeq7site123', a meta description, and a script tag loading the Vite/React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes Navigation, HeroSection, SectionCardGrid, and all 7 content sections (Games, Proxy, Shows, Music, Apps, Hacks, Live TV) plus Footer.
frontend/src/components/AppCard.tsx: Presentational card component for a web app entry, displaying an emoji icon, name, description, and a neon-blue 'Open App' button that triggers an onOpen callback.
frontend/src/components/AppsSection.tsx: Apps section component rendering a grid of AppCards for 8 social/media apps and an inline iframe browser chrome that loads the selected app's URL.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with brand logo, navigation links to all sections, a caffeine.ai attribution, and a copyright notice.
frontend/src/components/GameCard.tsx: Displays a single game card with thumbnail (or emoji fallback), genre badge, title, description, and a Play Now button that triggers an onPlay callback.
frontend/src/components/GamePlayer.tsx: Full-screen modal overlay that embeds a game in an iframe with a header showing the game title, an open-in-new-tab button, and a close button (also closeable via Escape key).
frontend/src/components/GamesSection.tsx: Fetches and displays a grid of game cards using a query hook, falls back to a hardcoded list of 18+ popular games, and renders a GamePlayer modal when a game is selected.
frontend/src/components/HackCard.tsx: Presentational card component that displays a hack's category badge, emoji, title, and description with hover styling.
frontend/src/components/HacksSection.tsx: Renders a section of 16 hardcoded hacks and tips (game cheats, browser tricks, keyboard shortcuts, tech hacks) as a grid of HackCard components.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with background gradients, glow orbs, a logo, tagline, and CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to each site section (Games, Movies & TV, Proxy, Music, Apps, Hacks, Live TV).
frontend/src/components/LiveTVCard.tsx: Renders a card UI for a live TV channel with an emoji icon, LIVE badge, category badge, hover overlay, and a 'Watch Live' button that triggers the onWatch callback.
frontend/src/components/LiveTVPlayer.tsx: Modal overlay component that embeds a live TV channel in a 16:9 iframe, with a header showing channel info, an external link button, and close-on-Escape/backdrop-click behavior.
frontend/src/components/LiveTVSection.ts: Section component that defines a hardcoded list of 8 live TV channels and renders them as a responsive grid of LiveTVCards, opening a LiveTVPlayer modal when a channel is selected.
frontend/src/components/MusicCard.tsx: Renders a card UI for a music station with an emoji icon, genre badge, hover overlay with headphones icon, and a 'Listen' button that triggers the onPlay callback.
frontend/src/components/MusicPlayer.tsx: Modal overlay component that embeds a music station in a 16:9 iframe, with a header showing station name and genre, an external link button, and close-on-Escape/backdrop-click behavior.
frontend/src/components/MusicSection.tsx: Section component that defines a hardcoded list of 8 music stations and renders them as a responsive grid of MusicCards, opening a MusicPlayer modal when a station is selected.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with a logo, desktop nav links with active-section highlighting via scroll detection, and a mobile hamburger menu for the site's main sections.
frontend/src/components/ProxySection.tsx: A web proxy UI component that lets users enter a URL, validates and normalizes it, then loads it in an embedded iframe with refresh and clear controls.
Renders a grid of clickable section cards (Games, Proxy, Movies, Music, Apps, Hacks, Live TV) that smooth-scroll to their corresponding page sections when clicked.
frontend/src/components/ShowCard.tsx: Displays a single show or movie card with a thumbnail (or emoji fallback), title, description, and a 'Watch Now' button that triggers a provided callback.
frontend/src/components/ShowsSection.tsx: Fetches shows from the backend (falling back to a hardcoded list) and renders them as a grid of ShowCards, opening a VideoPlayer modal when a show is selected.
frontend/src/components/VideoPlayer.tsx: A fullscreen modal video player that embeds a show's URL in an iframe, supports Escape-key and backdrop-click to close, and locks body scroll while open.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an Internet Computer backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient. Exports `useInternetIdentity` hook and `InternetIdentityProvider` component with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines two React Query hooks, `useGetAllGames` and `useGetAllShows`, that fetch all games and shows respectively from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, and defines CSS custom properties for a dark maroon/near-black theme with neon blue accents, including glow text utilities and a grid background pattern.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, neon glow box shadows, custom border radii, and gradient background images to match the site's dark neon design system.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state including version, feature list, architectural notes, and a summary describing the site as a multi-section web app with proxy, games, shows, apps, hacks, music, and live TV sections styled with a dark EDUrocks-inspired neon blue UI.
